description: Qodo is an AI code review and governance platform for software engineering teams. It provides pull-request review, codebase context and reasoning, and rule-based governance across developer workflows.
summary: Qodo exposes a documented Context Engine MCP server, an npm-distributed `qodo` CLI (`@qodo/command`), and open Agent Skills installed via `npx skills`; the clearly documented developer credential is a Qodo private system API key.
